LanguageData.TunnelerLife_RockfillCannotPlaceOnWater: Rockfill cannot be placed on deep water.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_RockfillUnsupportedMaterial: Rockfill supports granite, limestone, marble, sandstone, and slate chunks.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_RockfillNoChunksAvailable: No supported stone chunks are available.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_WallRebuildingDisabled: Wall rebuilding is disabled in Tunneler Life settings.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalPipeAlreadyHere: A thermal pipe is already planned or built here.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalSystemDisabled: Heating system is disabled in Tunneler Life settings.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_HiddenThermalPipesDisabled: Hidden thermal pipes are disabled in Tunneler Life settings.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_WaterproofThermalPipesDisab: Waterproof thermal pipes are disabled in Tunneler Life settings.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_BuildableDisabled: This Tunneler Life build option is disabled in mod settings.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsIntro: Configure which Tunneler Life systems are active. Disabled systems are hidden from the build menu where possible, and their gameplay logic stops running on existing buildings.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsCommandsIntro: Runtime controls, visual aids, and troubleshooting options.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsSectionWorldRebuild: Options for rebuilding mined tunnel cells into natural stone walls with supported rock chunks.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsEnableWallRebuildin: Show and allow rockfill wall rebuilding tools.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsSectionThermalSyste: Options for thermal pipes, vents, manual valves, thermostatic valves, and room temperature transfer.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsEnableThermalSystem: Show and allow thermal pipes, vents, valves, and temperature transfer.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsThermostatTolerance: Thermostatic valves ignore temperature differences smaller than this value.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsThermalTransferStre: Multiplier for how quickly connected vents move room temperatures toward the pipe network average.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsSectionPipeVariants: Optional pipe build variants. Disabling one hides it from the build menu while leaving the basic thermal pipe available.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsEnableHiddenThermal: Show and allow invisible protected thermal pipes.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsEnableWaterproofThe: Show and allow thermal pipes that can be built through shallow water and mud.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsSectionInterfaceDia: Visual aids and troubleshooting output for understanding thermal networks.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsShowThermalOverlayD: Draw the colored pipe network overlay while the thermal category or a thermal build tool is selected.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsShowVentDirectionMa: Draw colored placement markers for the vent air side and pipe connection sides.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_SettingsEnableThermalDebugI: Write extra thermal overlay diagnostics to the RimWorld log for troubleshooting.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalVentNeedsRoomSide: Thermal vent requires an open room on its room side.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalVentNeedsPipeSide: Thermal vent requires a thermal pipe on its pipe side.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_CommandOpenThermalInspector: Open detailed diagnostics for the connected thermal pipe network.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalInspectorSummaryNoCo: Thermal network: no connected pipe network
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalInspectorFlowPathRea: Flow path: input and output available
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_ThermalInspectorFlowPathMis: Flow path: missing input or output
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_CommandToggleThermalVentFlo: Switch whether this vent pulls air from its air side into the pipe network or pushes pipe air out through its air side.
LanguageData.TunnelerLife_CommandDesignateOpenCloseTh: Designate this thermal valve to be opened or closed. A colonist will come soon to adjust temperature transfer through the pipe network.
